title: Entire Series Up on Hulu Japan
display_title: Entire Series Up on Hulu Japan
wikitext:
[]: Entire Series Up on Hulu Japan             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Jun 06, 2015 2:22 pm Just found out that the entire series is up on Hulu Japan right now (as seen below, I didn't find this, I'm just linking it here). No clue if it's HD or not. Proof Go nuts?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 06, 2015 2:38 pm I think awhile back they said it's not HD, due to wanting to bring up hype for the BD/DVD release this Summer. I nearly forgot it was on Hulu Japan, so thanks for mentioning it.

[]:             Quote Post by CNF1 » Sat Jun 06, 2015 2:43 pm Hey there, I was the one who gave C.A.P. a link to this via Facebook, and that's pretty much the reason why I'm here haha. Super jealous that Hulu Japan has this and the American one doesn't. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Jun 06, 2015 2:49 pm Does this include EOE? Or just the TV ending?

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Jun 06, 2015 2:49 pm Doesn't look like EOE is included.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jun 06, 2015 10:49 pm Too bad - I'd love to get some HD screen caps.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 07, 2015 2:14 pm Just a reminder: Sailor Star Dust wrote: I think awhile back they said it's not HD, due to wanting to bring up hype for the BD/DVD release this Summer.
